prompt_text: Best AI tooling alternatives for AI engineers at startups and enterprises building LLM applications teams on a budget
response:
# AI Tooling Stack for Budget-Conscious LLM Teams

## **Core Development & Inference**

### Open Source (Free/Self-hosted)
- **LLaMA / Mistral / Llama 2** - Run locally with Ollama or vLLM
- **LangChain / LlamaIndex** - Free frameworks for building LLM apps
- **Ray / Replicate** - Distributed inference without cloud lock-in
- **LocalAI** - Drop-in OpenAI API replacement (self-hosted)

### Affordable APIs
- **Groq** - Fastest inference, free tier available
- **Together AI** - Pay-as-you-go, ~70% cheaper than OpenAI
- **Perplexity Labs API** - Competitive pricing for research models
- **Anyscale Endpoints** - LLaMA hosting, reasonable rates
- **Hugging Face Inference API** - Per-token pricing, start free

---

## **Evaluation & Monitoring**

### Free/Open Source
- **RAGAS** - RAG evaluation framework (open source)
- **LangSmith Community** - Basic tracing (freemium)
- **Arize Phoenix** - Open-source LLM monitoring
- **Weights & Biases Community** - Free tier for experiments
- **DeepEval** - Open-source LLM testing framework

### Budget Options
- **Braintrust** - Pay for what you use, no minimums
- **Humanloop** - Evaluation & versioning (startup pricing)
- **Galileo** - Data quality (academic/startup discounts)

---

## **Vector Databases & Storage**

### Free/Self-hosted
- **Milvus / Qdrant / Weaviate** - Open-source vector DBs
- **Postgres + pgvector** - Use existing infrastructure
- **Chroma** - Lightweight, embedded option
- **FAISS** - Meta's lightweight indexing

### Affordable Managed
- **Pinecone** - Generous free tier (1M vectors)
- **Supabase** - PostgreSQL with pgvector built-in
- **Upstash** - Serverless Redis, pay-per-request

---

## **Prompt Management & Experimentation**

### Free Tools
- **Prompthub / PromptLayer** - Limited free tier
- **GitHub** + version control - DIY solution
- **Weights & Biases** - Experiment tracking (free tier)
- **OpenRouter** - Compare models across APIs easily

### Low-Cost
- **Langfuse** - Open source + cloud option (~$99/mo)
- **Humanloop** - Versioning + A/B testing

---

## **Data Preparation & Labeling**

### Budget-Friendly
- **Argilla** - Open-source data labeling & feedback loops
- **Label Studio** - Self-hosted annotation tool
- **Prodigy** - One-time license (~$300), then self-hosted
- **Hugging Face Datasets** - Free labeled datasets

### For Synthetic Data
- **Outlines** - Structured generation (open source)
- **Synthetica / SDV** - Synthetic data generation

---

## **Infrastructure & Deployment**

### Serverless/Low-Cost Compute
- **Modal** - $0.50/GPU hour, scales to zero
- **Banana / Inferless** - Cheaper GPU hosting
- **Railway / Render** - $5-25/mo for apps
- **Hugging Face Spaces** - Free inference hosting
- **Replit** - Free tier for prototyping

### Self-hosted on Budget
- **Docker + AWS EC2 spot instances** - 70% savings
- **Lambda + ECS** - Pay per invocation
- **Fly.io** - Affordable always-on instances

---

## **Recommended Startup Stack** (Minimal Spend)

```
Development:
- LangChain + Ollama (local dev)
- Together AI or Groq (inference)

Data:
- Postgres + pgvector
- Argilla (feedback loops)

Evaluation:
- RAGAS + custom evals
- Braintrust (light monitoring)

Deployment:
- Modal or Railway
- GitHub Actions (CI/CD)

Costs
